examples.title: K-Fold Cross Validation
examples.description: Implementation of dataset splitting for evaluation
examples.code:
PROCEDURE KFoldValidation(data, k)
  folds = split(data, k)
  FOR i IN 1..k:
    train = folds[0..i-1] + folds[i+1..k]
    test = folds[i]
    model.train(train)
    metrics.append(model.evaluate(test))
  RETURN mean(metrics)
examples.explanation: Creates k partitions, uses each as test set once
